---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe the pain point clearly.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Impact

Which component(s) does this affect?
- [ ] Sentry (network enforcement / eBPF/XDP)
- [ ] Scale (semantic validation)
- [ ] Executioner (operations / failover)
- [ ] Telemetry / Ledger
- [ ] Cluster sync
- [ ] Frontend / UI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Mockups, related issues, or any other context.
